experiment: causal-host FULL-FORGE gate (GPT-2, proxy-train E + score on the full multi-layer NativeModel forge)
protocol: sweep_pareto_capability(train_encoder=True, train_objective='proxy', host_layer=8); SAE-derived labels; per-token (residue) feed; matched to the ESM bio gate (proxy-train + full-forge-score); 3 seeds; 200 steps.
comparison: ESM-2 proxy bio gate at n=128 was Δ -0.0003 (tie); GPT-2 full forge at n=128 is Δ +0.039 ± 0.003 -> the causal trained-encoder win SURVIVES the full multi-layer forge, unlike ESM.
verdict: SURVIVES at n=128/256 (mid widths), ERASED at n=64 (smallest). The causal projection win is FORGE-level, not just activation-level. Descriptive; delta is the optimistic all-token row delta (same caveat as the ESM bio gate), overfit_flag clean at n=128. SAE-type confound (ReLU vs TopK) still stands.
